# Repos scanned weekly by .github/workflows/scan-commits.yml
#
# Lines starting with `#` and blank lines are ignored. One `org/repo` per line.
# Remove anything that shouldn't drive new commands / skills / agents / hooks.
# Pass `repos: |` via workflow_dispatch to override at run time.
